sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95000" key="sklhropoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκληρο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n95000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making hard, hardening</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.953c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
